case_title: POLICE, RAMIN VS PACIFIC SAND & GRAVEL, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,625.89 FILED BY POLICE, RAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC SAND & GRAVEL, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TWO COPIES OF CLAIM WAS FORWARDED TO THE SHERIFF DEPT TOGETHER WITH THE $30.00 CHECK.
CLAIM WITH THE $30 CHECK W/C WAS RETURNED BY SF SHERIFF WAS RETURNED TO THE PLTF - EXPLAINED NOT SERVING OUTSIDE SF COUNTY.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC SAND & GRAVEL, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POLICE, RAMIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC SAND & GRAVEL, INC. $6,625.89 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,745.89 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF DEPT RETURNED THE CLAIM FOR SERVICE. THEY DO NOT DO SERVICE OUTSIDE THE COUNTY.
